name: Run Your Own Fnaf Pizzeria
description:
You can be your own boss

(kinda)

Hire New Staff to join the Faz Bear Family

(Make your staff always wear a smile!)

Buy new play structures and animatronics for the children

(We can't guarantee your safety)

And most importantly make sure to always rid of any evidence and as always make sure it's done with a smile.

28/09/2025 (day, month, year)

-Added Now hiring at Freddy's into the chat
